  1. org.springframework.cloud.zookeeper.serviceregistry

Uses of Package
org.springframework.cloud.zookeeper.serviceregistry

Packages that use org.springframework.cloud.zookeeper.serviceregistry
Package
Description
org.springframework.cloud.zookeeper.serviceregistry
 
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.zookeeper.serviceregistry used by org.springframework.cloud.zookeeper.serviceregistry
    Class
    Description
    ServiceInstanceRegistration
    Registration that lazily builds a ServiceInstance so the port can by dynamically set (for instance, when the user wants a dynamic port for spring boot.
    ServiceInstanceRegistration.RegistrationBuilder
    A builder for ServiceInstanceRegistration.
    ZookeeperAutoServiceRegistration
    Zookeeper AbstractAutoServiceRegistration that uses ZookeeperServiceRegistry to register and de-register instances.
    ZookeeperRegistration
     
    ZookeeperServiceRegistry
